description_long: This is a standard-sized toothpaste tube with a predominantly white body and a bold red label that wraps around the upper surface. The label features the text 'Best Tooth Paste*' in large, white, sans-serif font, making it easily identifiable. The tube is slightly flattened, suggesting it has been partially used, and the end opposite the cap is crimped shut. The cap is ribbed, cylindrical, and appears to be a screw-on type, made of white plastic. The overall finish of the tube is smooth and slightly glossy, typical of laminated or plastic-coated packaging. The object is compact and portable, designed for personal hygiene use.
description: A white toothpaste tube with a red label reading 'Best Tooth Paste*' and a ribbed screw-on cap. The tube is smooth, slightly glossy, and compact.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the tube, the red label with 'Tooth Paste*' text, and the white ribbed cap on the left.
description_view_1: End view from the crimped, sealed side, displaying the red label's top surface and the 'Best Tooth Paste*' text running along the tube.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, showing the tube's length, the red label with reversed text, and the cap on the right.
description_view_3: View from the cap end, highlighting the ribbed screw-on cap and the tube's flattened, crimped body.
attribute_label_design: Red background with large white sans-serif text, label wraps around the top, minimal graphics, no visible logo.
attribute_tube_orientation: lying horizontally with cap to the left
